name: Harbor Bar Charleston
description: Charleston's iconic bachelorette party boat. BYOB sunset cruises departing from downtown marina with harbor views, onboard restrooms, sound system, and coolers with ice.
price_note: $45 weekday / $55 weekend per person for public cruises (1hr 45min). Private group charters from $625 for up to 26 guests.
booking_tip: Sunset cruises book up fast on weekends. Book at least 2-3 weeks in advance, earlier during peak season (March-October).

name: Tiki Tours of Charleston (Friki Tiki)
description: 32-passenger tiki-style party boat with BYOB, onboard restrooms, and Bluetooth sound system. Choose from 2, 2.5, or 3-hour cruises around Charleston Harbor.
price_note: 2hr for $80/person, 2.5hr for $100/person, 3hr for $120/person. Minimum 10 people per group.
booking_tip: Minimum 10 people required, which works perfectly for your group size.

name: Charleston Party Cat
description: Catamaran party cruise with DJ, snacks, and drinks. Exclusively for bachelor/bachelorette parties with room for up to 45 guests. Also offers public booze cruises.
price_note: $140/person for private bachelorette party charter. $60/person for public booze cruises.
booking_tip: Private charters include a DJ, which is a great perk for a bachelorette group.

name: Charleston Cocktail Co.
description: Private hands-on cocktail making class taught by expert bartenders. Learn to craft craft cocktails with fresh ingredients while your group enjoys a fun, interactive experience.
price_note: $85 per person with a class minimum of $850 (10 people).
address: Charleston, SC (mobile / comes to your venue)
booking_tip: The $850 minimum works perfectly for a group of 10. They can come to your Airbnb or rental.

name: Cocktail Crew
description: BYOB private mixology class with a charismatic bartender who teaches your group to make 2-3 craft cocktails. They bring all the tools and ingredients to your location.
address: Charleston, SC (mobile / comes to your venue)
booking_tip: Great pre-game activity before a night out. They come to you, so no travel needed.

name: Fetes de Fleurs - Flower Crown Party
description: A flower crown-making workshop where an instructor brings fresh flowers, greenery, and rose to your location. Create beautiful real flower crowns to wear out on the town.
price_note: Contact for exact pricing. Includes fresh flowers, all supplies, and a bottle of rose.
address: Charleston, SC (mobile / comes to your venue)
area: Your Airbnb, hotel, or local venue
booking_tip: They travel free to Folly Beach, Sullivans Island, and Isle of Palms. Schedule before going out so you can wear your crowns!

name: DivaDance Parties Charleston
description: Private group dance party where a choreographer teaches your group a fun routine to pop, hip-hop, or heels music. No dance experience needed - just energy and enthusiasm!
price_note: Starting at $40 per person for a 60-90 minute party.
address: Pop-up locations across Charleston or mobile to your venue
area: Downtown Charleston / Folly Beach / Mt. Pleasant
booking_tip: Choose your vibe: pop, hip-hop, heels, or chair dance. Contact Baker at 803-260-6180 to book.

name: Bulldog Tours - Ghost & Dungeon Tour
description: A 90-minute walking tour through Charleston's haunted alleyways and dark corners, including an exclusive tour of a real dungeon. Award-winning guides share chilling local history.
price_note: Ghost & Dungeon Tour: $39/adult. VIP Ghost Package: $49/adult. Private group tours available.
booking_tip: The VIP package is worth the upgrade. Ask about private tours for your group.

name: Earthling Day Spa
description: One of the largest full-service day spas in Charleston with group spa packages. Offers massage therapy, facials, nail care, and unique treatments from around the world.
price_note: Varies by treatment. Contact for custom group spa packages.
booking_tip: Large enough to accommodate the whole group at once. Book well in advance for weekend availability.

name: Bloom Wellness Spa - Bachelorette Package
description: Tiered bachelorette spa party packages including champagne toast, customized treatments, and celebration vibes. The popular 'Pamper' option is under $200/guest.
price_note: Pamper package under $200/person. Ultimate Spa Day: $499/person (includes 60-min massage with hot towels and hot stones). Champagne toast included.
booking_tip: Most bachelorette groups choose the Pamper option. Non-alcoholic champagne available.

name: Charleston SUP Safaris - Paddleboard Tour
description: Guided stand-up paddleboard and kayak tours on the Folly River. See dolphins in their natural habitat while paddling through beautiful Lowcountry waterways.
price_note: $45/adult for the Sunset Dolphin Safari tour. Large group discounts available.
booking_tip: Can accommodate groups from 10 to 75 people. The Sunset Dolphin Safari is the most popular option for groups. July will be hot - go early morning or sunset.

name: Poogan's Porch
description: Iconic Charleston Southern restaurant famous for brunch, biscuits, she-crab soup, fried green tomatoes, and pimento fritters. Private dining rooms available for groups of 10-110.
price_note: Brunch entrees typically $15-30 plus drinks. Private dining available for groups.
booking_tip: Has private dining rooms perfect for a bachelorette brunch. Make reservations well in advance.

name: Church and Union
description: Stunning restaurant inside a 105-year-old church featuring brunch (Fri-Sun 9am-3:30pm) with indulgent items like praline French toast and PB&J cinnamon rolls. Beautiful backdrop for photos.
price_note: Brunch entrees $18-35 plus cocktails. Large groups require a credit card on file and group menu selection.
booking_tip: Request their Private Dining Packet for group menus. The church interior is incredibly photogenic.

name: The Cocktail Club
description: Upscale craft cocktail lounge perched above The Macintosh on upper King Street. Features house-made infusions, rare liquors, farm-to-shaker drinks, and light fare. Multiple 'Best Cocktails' awards.
booking_tip: Open Tue-Sun 5PM-2AM. Gets crowded in the evenings - arrive early or make a reservation for your group.

name: Republic Garden & Lounge
description: Trendy King Street venue with Charleston's only street-level garden, chic lounge, craft cocktails, bottle service, and live DJs. Popular for bachelorette groups.
price_note: Cocktails $12-18. Bottle service and private event packages available.
booking_tip: Ask about VIP bottle service or a reserved section for the group. The outdoor garden is stunning.

name: The Commodore
description: Vintage-vibe cocktail bar and live music venue with 1950s-inspired decor, dim lighting, and mid-century furnishings. Live R&B, soul, and funk bands perform up to 5 nights a week.
price_note: Cocktails $12-16. Possible cover charge on live music nights.
booking_tip: Check their schedule for live music nights. The Majestics and Future Funk are crowd favorites.

name: King Street Shopping
description: Named one of America's 'Top 10 Shopping Streets' by U.S. News. Stroll charming blocks of independent boutiques, national retailers, and chic home stores. Popular stops include Finicky Filly, House of Sage, Beau & Ro, and Beckett Boutique.
price_note: Free to walk and window shop. Budget depends on your shopping habits!
booking_tip: Start at Upper King and work your way down. Lower King has the high-end antique shops, Middle King has the boutiques, Upper King has the trendy bars and restaurants.

name: Sip History - Cocktail History Tour
description: Walking cocktail tour that combines Charleston history with craft cocktails. Visit multiple bars while learning about the city's rich drinking culture and Southern hospitality.
price_note: Approximately $75-95 per person. Includes cocktails at multiple stops.
booking_tip: Combines sightseeing with drinking - a great way to kick off a night out.
